per_scenario.one_line_critique: Highly efficient turn usage, but failed to call the specific dashboard tool and repeated data already present in the artifacts.
The agent followed the briefing workflow perfectly but failed the narrow-scope constraint by querying and receiving Reddit data.
The agent failed to report specific numeric deltas, instead providing absolute values and a generic summary that ignored the requested change-focused analysis.
Excellent adherence to the verification workflow, successfully correcting claims after a FAIL verdict without external intervention.
